info.title: Dossier Public API
info.description: Public API contract for Dossier. This file is a pre-build review artifact and does not include application code. Scope: public endpoints only. Internal admin endpoints such as /internal/registry/import and /internal/registry/verify are intentionally omitted. OpenAPI path parameters use {destinationId} as the standard translation of the product spec notation :destinationId.

post.summary: Verify Google identity and create an app session

get.summary: Get the current session and user

post.summary: Create a transcript from captured audio
Extract facts, people, places, business matches, and timeline details
Match a likely business or venue from location and report context
Return ranked, source-backed routes for a case
Build a destination-aware email preview from an approved draft
Record a send or handoff action

error.message: Route data could not be loaded right now.

firebase_id_token.description: Firebase Auth ID token issued after Google sign-in on the client.
